title: Cobblemon Eclipse
body:
This modpack has Cobblemon alongside many QoL and performance mods to make your gameplay experience smoother and more enjoyable.
Designed to be lightweight and highly optimized, it runs comfortably even on lower-end PCs.

---

🚫 No pay-to-win. Not now, not ever.
You cannot buy stats or advantages. Every strong team on this server was earned by playing.

--- You can also join the **Cobblemon Eclipse** server directly from the start menu. Begin your adventure, catch Pokémon, battle gyms, and play together with friends online.
🌒 Server Features --- ### 🐾 Pokémon & Gameplay - Mega Evolutions (classic + ZA megas) - World Boss — up to 100 players in their own 1v1, all damage feeds one shared HP pool - CobbleSkills — 19 skills up to level 999, including Cobblemon-specific ones (shiny hunting, catching) - Alphas — large wild Pokémon fought with real Minecraft combat; legendary alphas are multi-phase boss fights - Catch Combos with bad-luck protection (longer hunts quietly improve your odds) - Area Zero — all 20 paradox Pokémon on Scarlet/Violet-matching spawn tables - Daily Dungeons - Safari Zone - Legendaries & Mythicals - Custom Fakemon - Radiant Shinies - Pokémon Breeding & Hidden Abilities - Pokédex Rewards - Research Tasks - Free Seasonal Battlepass - Events Hosted 4× Weekly - Player Gyms & NPC Gyms — 8 gyms → Elite Four → Champion, with Hard Mode - Battle Tower - Tournaments — every couple of weeks, live bracket on the wiki - Outbreaks - Build Competitions - In-Game Voice Chat (Optional) --- ### 🌍 Survival & Worlds - Weekly Resetting Resource World - Vanilla Mobs - Terralith, Nullscape Biomes - Flan Land Claiming & Base Protection - Public Homes, Towns, & Warps - Server Villager Hall --- ### 💰 Economy & Shops - Daily & Weekly Kits - Player-Driven Economy - In-Game Shops, WonderTrade, & GTS - Decorative Head Shop - Hidden Ability Shop - Shiny & Hidden Ability Crates - Earned naturally by playing — **never sold**
--- ### 🚫 Genuinely not pay-to-win — and we mean it Most servers say this. Here's exactly what it means on Eclipse: - **You cannot buy Pokémon.** No store listing will ever hand you a shiny, a legendary, or a competitive team. If you want strong Pokémon, you catch and breed them like everyone else. - **Ranks come from playtime**, not your wallet. The players with the highest ranks have simply been here the longest. - **Crates are earned by playing** — through gameplay, events, and natural progression. They are not for sale, period. - **Store purchases don't give competitive edges.** Most of the store is cosmetics. The non-cosmetic options are server-wide boosts (shiny rates, breeding) that apply to every player on the server equally — not just the buyer. - **No pay-to-win has ever existed here** — this isn't a recent policy change, it's how the server has always been built. If you've been burned by p2w Cobblemon servers before, Eclipse was specifically designed as the alternative. --- ### 📖 The wiki We run a deep wiki at **[cobblemoneclipse.com](https://cobblemoneclipse.com)** — the most detailed Cobblemon Pokédex online, plus a spawn finder, damage calculator, and the live tournament bracket. Worth a look even if you don't end up playing. ### 🚀 Getting on Install this pack (one click in the Modrinth app or Prism), launch it, and pick **Cobblemon Eclipse** from the multiplayer menu. Server IP if you ever need it by hand: `play.cobblemoneclipse.com`. Discord is **[discord.gg/cobblemoneclipse](https://discord.gg/cobblemoneclipse)** if you want to ask anything before hopping on.
